name: cognigy-mcp-server
description: Connect your AI assistant to Cognigy.AI — create, test, and improve LLM-based AI Agents through a self-improvement loop.
long_description:
A Model Context Protocol server that exposes the Cognigy.AI API through focused, purpose-built tools for LLM-based AI Agents.

Create a complete AI Agent setup in one tool call (Agent + Flow + Job Node + Endpoint), configure LLMs, attach knowledge stores and tools, deploy to Webchat, then talk to it, evaluate responses, and iterate until it's perfect.

Supports: AI Agent creation and configuration, LLM setup, knowledge management (RAG), tool creation (HTTP, MCP, email, knowledge), flow node editing, Webchat v3 deployment, and direct agent testing via REST endpoints.

cognigy_api_key.title: Cognigy API Key
cognigy_api_key.description: Your Cognigy API key (Cognigy.AI → User Menu → My Profile → API Keys)

tools.name: create_ai_agent
tools.description: Create a complete AI Agent with auto-provisioned flow, job node, and REST endpoint

tools.name: update_ai_agent
tools.description: Update an AI Agent's persona, guardrails, job configuration, and LLM settings

tools.name: setup_llm
tools.description: Create an LLM resource (GPT-4, Claude, etc.) in a project

tools.name: talk_to_agent
tools.description: Send a message to an AI Agent and get its response for testing

tools.name: list_resources
tools.description: List projects, agents, flows, endpoints, LLMs, knowledge stores, and more

tools.name: get_resource
tools.description: Get detailed information about a single Cognigy resource

tools.name: manage_knowledge
tools.description: Create knowledge stores, add sources (URL, text, file), and list chunks for RAG

tools.name: create_tool
tools.description: Create a tool (HTTP, knowledge, email, MCP) on an AI Agent's job node

tools.name: update_tool
tools.description: Update an existing tool node's configuration

tools.name: manage_webchat
tools.description: Create or configure a Webchat v3 endpoint for website deployment

tools.name: manage_flow_nodes
tools.description: Create, update, delete, or list flow nodes for conversation logic
